test.note: 38 tests passed, 2 failed. Failures are pre-existing issues unrelated to milestone 7 (MockTimeSlotRepository not found in old test files). Stock deduction tests related to AI agent work all pass.

typecheck.note: Multiple TypeScript errors exist in the codebase, but none are related to the AI agent features implemented in milestone 7. Errors are in legacy test files and other pre-existing code.

lint.note: 212 errors and 40 warnings, mostly in auto-generated React Router type files and pre-existing code. None related to milestone 7 AI features.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the exception for AI tool files in packages/api/src/services/ai/chat/tools/ - they instantiate repositories directly with `new` rather than using dependency injection. This is a known and accepted pattern deviation.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: All AI tool files (inventory.ts, recommendations.ts, services.ts, patient.ts, appointments.ts) instantiate repositories directly. This is consistent within the AI tools directory but differs from the standard DI pattern.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the recommendation scoring algorithm used in AI recommendations: category matches (+30), time since last visit (+20 for >60 days), service usage history (+5 per use), complementary products (+40).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: recommendations.ts lines 207-267 contain the scoring logic that future maintainers should understand.

rejectedObservations.observation: Repository direct instantiation in AI tools
rejectedObservations.note: This is a known pattern in the AI tools directory and was captured as a suggested guidance update rather than an issue.

m7-1-ai-inventory-tools.summary: Successfully implemented two VoltAgent tools (check_inventory and get_product_info) that enable WhatsApp conversations to query inventory data. Follows existing patterns, integrates with repository layer, handles errors gracefully, uses Spanish for user-facing messages.

m7-2-ai-recommendations.summary: Successfully implemented three AI tools (get_client_history, get_service_recommendations, get_upsell_recommendations) providing context-aware recommendations based on client history, service categories, visit patterns, and product associations.
